title: lasiorrhiza scrobiculata
intro: Lasiorrhiza scrobiculata, also known as the "Himalayan root," is a type of plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever and cough. Lasiorrhiza scrobiculata is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
